overall.description: A first-person exploration of the Hufflepuff common room from Hogwarts Legacy, featuring cozy dormitories with wooden furniture, stone archways, a large round door with stained glass, and a main common room with a fireplace and students in robes.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory bedroom with multiple four-poster beds

agents.ego_description: walking through the quiet dormitory, observing the wooden beds and furniture

entered.detail: large stone archway with wooden trim marking the room entrance
four-poster wooden bed with checkered bedding
wooden writing desk with books and a table lamp
large wall hanging depicting a forest scene behind the bed
circular wooden door with intricate stained glass panels depicting plants

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cozy dormitory with multiple wooden four-poster beds arranged against stone walls. The camera moves past a writing desk with a lit lamp and a forest tapestry, approaching a distinctive round door with stained glass panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase and upper hallway with carved railings

events.description: passing through the round door into a narrow corridor with wooden stairs
ascending the curved wooden staircase with ornate railings

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved wooden staircase, passing potted plants on the landing

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with carved banisters and newel posts
ornately carved wooden railing with geometric patterns
potted evergreen tree on the stair landing
rough-hewn stone wall with wooden paneling

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the round door into a narrow corridor and begins ascending a curved wooden staircase. The space features ornately carved railings, stone walls, and potted plants, transitioning from the dormitory to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: main common room with central fireplace and seating areas

events.description: descending from the upper walkway into the main common room
approaching the lit fireplace with students gathered nearby

agents.ego_description: descending into the main common room and walking toward the fireplace area

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on a leather sofa near the fireplace

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with a roaring fire and carved wooden mantel
brown leather sofas arranged in a seating area around the fireplace
circular patterned rug on the stone floor
framed portraits hanging on the stone walls
thick wooden support pillars with carved details

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into a spacious common room dominated by a large stone fireplace with a roaring fire. Leather sofas and round rugs create cozy seating areas, while students in robes relax nearby. Wooden pillars and potted plants decorate the space, with portraits hanging on the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room upper level and exit corridors

events.description: ascending stone steps toward the upper level of the common room
passing through an archway into a narrower corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room upper level, passing students and heading toward the exit corridor

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking toward the camera

entered.detail: arched wooden doorway leading to the corridor
narrow corridor with stone walls and wooden ceiling beams
lit wall-mounted lantern with a glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the upper level of the common room, passing a student walking in the opposite direction. It ascends stone steps and passes through a wooden archway into a narrower corridor with stone walls and lit wall lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved corridor connecting common room to dormitory

events.description: entering the curved corridor with the round door visible ahead
moving into a dimmer section of the corridor with wall sconces

agents.ego_description: walking through the curved stone corridor, returning toward the dormitory area

entered.detail: curved hallway with stone walls and decorative wooden wainscoting
wall-mounted light fixture with a warm glow
heavy wooden door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a walk through a curved stone corridor with decorative wooden paneling and wall sconces. The camera passes the round door with stained glass again and continues toward a wooden door at the end of the hallway, completing the loop back toward the dormitory.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that journeys from a cozy dormitory through the heart of the Hufflepuff common room before looping back toward the starting point. It begins among wooden four-poster beds and a lit writing desk, moving toward a distinctive round stained-glass door that opens into a narrow corridor and a curved wooden staircase. As the camera descends from the upper level, the space expands into a spacious common room centered around a roaring stone fireplace with leather sofas and students in robes. The scene then shifts back upward through a wooden archway and into a corridor lit by wall lanterns, passing a student walking in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera glides through a curved stone hallway with decorative wooden paneling, passing the round stained-glass door once more before approaching a wooden door at the end of the path.
